dashboard.label: Vigil — Humanitarian Gap Monitor
dashboard.description: Agentic deployment intelligence for humanitarian surge operations. Live IFRC GO data.

search.query: index=vigil sourcetype="ifrc:surge_alert" deployment_needed=true | stats count as open_gaps by country | sort -open_gaps | head 10
index=vigil sourcetype="ifrc:surge_alert" | stats count as total
index=vigil sourcetype="vigil:scored_gap" | stats count by severity_level
index=vigil sourcetype="ifrc:surge_alert" | stats count by status
index=vigil sourcetype="ifrc:surge_alert" | eval days_open=round(hours_open/24,1) | where days_open > 7 | table country, disaster_type, days_open, deployment_needed | sort -days_open
index=vigil sourcetype="ifrc:surge_alert" | stats count by disaster_type | sort -count
index=vigil sourcetype="vigil:scored_gap" | table _time, country, disaster_type, severity_level, severity_score, explanation_summary | sort -_time | head 20
index=vigil sourcetype="vigil:metrics" | stats latest(duration_ms) as last_cycle_ms, latest(gaps_count) as last_gaps_detected, latest(states_count) as last_alerts_processed
index=vigil sourcetype="vigil:scored_gap" | bin severity_score span=0.1 | stats count by severity_score | sort severity_score
